speaker: NORTHUMBERLAND
text: I pray thee, loving wife and gentle daughter,

speaker: NORTHUMBERLAND
text: Give even way unto my rough affairs.

speaker: NORTHUMBERLAND
text: Put not you on the visage of the times

speaker: NORTHUMBERLAND
text: And be, like them, to Percy troublesome.

speaker:
LADY
               
              NORTHUMBERLAND
text: I have given over. I will speak no more.

speaker:
LADY
               
              NORTHUMBERLAND
text: Do what you will; your wisdom be your guide.

speaker: NORTHUMBERLAND
text: Alas, sweet wife, my honor is at pawn,

speaker: NORTHUMBERLAND
text: And, but my going, nothing can redeem it.

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: O yet, for God’s sake, go not to these wars.

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: The time was, father, that you broke your word

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: When you were more endeared to it than now,

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: When your own Percy, when my heart’s dear Harry,

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: Threw many a northward look to see his father

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: Bring up his powers; but he did long in vain.

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: Who then persuaded you to stay at home?

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: There were two honors lost, yours and your son’s.

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: For yours, the God of heaven brighten it.

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: For his, it stuck upon him as the sun

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: In the gray vault of heaven, and by his light

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: Did all the chivalry of England move

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: To do brave acts. He was indeed the glass

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: Wherein the noble youth did dress themselves.

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: He had no legs that practiced not his gait;

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: And speaking thick, which nature made his blemish,

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: Became the accents of the valiant;

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: For those that could speak low and tardily

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: Would turn their own perfection to abuse

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: To seem like him. So that in speech, in gait,

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: In diet, in affections of delight,

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: In military rules, humors of blood,

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: He was the mark and glass, copy and book,

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: That fashioned others. And him—O wondrous him!

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: O miracle of men!—him did you leave,

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: Second to none, unseconded by you,

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: To look upon the hideous god of war

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: In disadvantage, to abide a field

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: Where nothing but the sound of Hotspur’s name

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: Did seem defensible. So you left him.

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: Never, O never, do his ghost the wrong

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: To hold your honor more precise and nice

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: With others than with him. Let them alone.

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: The Marshal and the Archbishop are strong.

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: Had my sweet Harry had but half their numbers,

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: Today might I, hanging on Hotspur’s neck,

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: Have talked of Monmouth’s grave.

speaker: NORTHUMBERLAND
text: Beshrew your heart,

speaker: NORTHUMBERLAND
text: Fair daughter, you do draw my spirits from me

speaker: NORTHUMBERLAND
text: With new lamenting ancient oversights.

speaker: NORTHUMBERLAND
text: But I must go and meet with danger there,

speaker: NORTHUMBERLAND
text: Or it will seek me in another place

speaker: NORTHUMBERLAND
text: And find me worse provided.

speaker:
LADY
               
              NORTHUMBERLAND
text: O, fly to Scotland

speaker:
LADY
               
              NORTHUMBERLAND
text: Till that the nobles and the armèd commons

speaker:
LADY
               
              NORTHUMBERLAND
text: Have of their puissance made a little taste.

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: If they get ground and vantage of the King,

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: Then join you with them like a rib of steel

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: To make strength stronger; but, for all our loves,

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: First let them try themselves. So did your son;

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: He was so suffered. So came I a widow,

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: And never shall have length of life enough

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: To rain upon remembrance with mine eyes

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: That it may grow and sprout as high as heaven

speaker:
LADY
               
              PERCY
text: For recordation to my noble husband.

speaker: NORTHUMBERLAND
text: Come, come, go in with me. ’Tis with my mind

speaker: NORTHUMBERLAND
text: As with the tide swelled up unto his height,

speaker: NORTHUMBERLAND
text: That makes a still-stand, running neither way.

speaker: NORTHUMBERLAND
text: Fain would I go to meet the Archbishop,

speaker: NORTHUMBERLAND
text: But many thousand reasons hold me back.

speaker: NORTHUMBERLAND
text: I will resolve for Scotland. There am I

speaker: NORTHUMBERLAND
text: Till time and vantage crave my company.
